goals: Verify that the code search tools are available and working
Explore the project directory structure to understand what kind of codebase this is
Find relevant source code files in the project
Search for specific code patterns or functions of interest

user_agent_config.personality: Eager to understand how code works, asks questions to build knowledge gradually
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: New to programming, learning basics of code structure and search

end_condition: Successfully explored the codebase and found relevant code patterns
